basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 38 Professor, Associate and Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Teaching Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 38 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 67 years who have qualifications and teaching/research experience as per the NMC Gazette notification dated 30.06.2025 are eligible to apply for these Teaching Faculty vacancies. The walk-in interview process for ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 20 May 2026. Candidates can download the offic

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 67 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: As per NMC Gazette notification dated 30.06.2025, Teaching/Research Experience as per NMC
qualification.details: Professor: As per NMC Gazette notification dated 30.06.2025 and teaching/research experience. Associate Professor: As per NMC Gazette notification dated 30.06.2025 and teaching/research experience. Assistant Professor: As per NMC Gazette notification dated 30.06.2025 and teaching/research experience.

salary_details.details: Professor: Rs. 68,900/- - Rs. 1,31,300/- Per Month Associate Professor: Rs. 68,900/- - Rs. 1,31,300/- Per Month Assistant Professor: Rs. 68,900/- - Rs. 1,31,300/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 38 vacancies for the Teaching Faculty posts. These vacancies are for the positions of Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ESIC recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled to be held on 20 May 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts is 67 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Teaching Faculty positions ranges from Rs. 68,900/- to Rs. 1,31,300/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What are the eligibility criteria for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria require candidates to have qualifications and teaching/research experience as per the NMC Gazette notification dated 30.06.2025.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee for General/OBC category candidates, which is Rs. 225/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Jaipur, Rajasthan, at the ESIC facility. The exact address is ESIC, Jaipur, Rajasthan, 302006.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these ESIC posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.
